{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221120092008EA608DA8DEA9DAF5"}"},"total":34},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7223166317272089379","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好的一本书文笔通畅，看着平淡但实在，意境也不错。番茄的读者大多数喜欢浮夸的书，所以这书能看下去的不多，作者有些支撑不下去只能匆匆结束了吧！希望作者不要气馁重开一本，在叙事上打磨一下细节，情节上加一些冲突。不就吸引人了嘛！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1681774550,"group_id":"7125615689921989662","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2SPeyhmxI+6rv85RDCt4N7aM7V9VEo8QRu6UCvCNBBR","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"2823184040604622","user_name":"不想起名的金子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2823184040604622","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1743432374,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7125615689921989662","book_info":{"abstract":"当人类文明快速倒退，地震、寒潮、干旱席卷全球，在这场浩劫中我们该如何生活。
